specific_question: How has MediConn Solutions' AI-integrated software for physicians impact the number of responses needed for IT-related issues in 2025?
answer: According to an internal IT report in January 2025, MediConn Solutions' AI-integrated software for physicians has reduce the number of responses needed for IT-related issues by almost 75%.
